title: Buttery Creamy Indian Chickpeas Curry
description: A rich, silky chickpea curry cloaked in butter and coconut milk, slow‑cooked to perfection and perfect for a crowd‑pleasing dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the garam masala, cumin, coriander, chili powder, salt, and pepper; cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the tomato puree, stirring to combine; let it simmer for 5 minutes, allowing the tomatoes to thicken.
Add the cooked chickpeas and coconut milk to the pan, stirring to coat the chickpeas in the sauce.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and let the curry simmer gently for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
After simmering, stir in the butter until it has melted and the sauce is glossy and silky.
Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Remove from heat, sprinkle chopped cilantro over the top, and serve hot over rice or with naan.
